texto: What's on my playlist when I'm fighting is not so much hip-hop. Sometimes, it's something more inspirational. I get a chance to think about what I'm fighting for, like, my family. It takes me to that state because a lot of times, it's a spiritual warfare for me.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tyron Woodley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “What's on my playlist when I'm fighting is not so much hip-hop. Sometimes, it's something more in…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, family, spiritual pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e spiritual.
